ShortDescription.Value: Fixes the confirmed Signature phantom vacancy case and includes optional software-track tooling.

Publish.LongDescription:
No Office Demand Fix currently covers one shipped office-demand fix and one separate software-track investigation path in Cities: Skylines II.
- Signature Phantom Vacancy fix: removes stale PropertyOnMarket and PropertyToBeOnMarket state from occupied Signature office and industrial properties so false free-space counts stop suppressing demand. - Software track tools: includes an optional office-resource trade patch plus opt-in diagnostics for software producer/consumer investigation and evidence collection.
Current release status:
- fixes the reproduced Signature phantom vacancy case - keeps non-signature phantom vacancy under observation - keeps the software path available for comparison and diagnostics, not as a claimed full fix
Publish.ChangeLog: - Expanded software-track diagnostics with clearer producer/consumer detail and buyer-state visibility. - Extended phantom-vacancy investigation coverage beyond the confirmed Signature case. - Kept the software path positioned as comparison tooling rather than a claimed full fix.
